narrative: It is the annual Team Building Retreat, and the Boss throws a high-velocity projectile at me to test my "synergistic reflexes." To return fire with an appropriate amount of non-lethal, corporate-approved enthusiasm, I hurl a [PlayerKeyword] back at him.
validationTestPrompt: If throwing [PlayerKeyword] at a person would cause a lot of pain return false, else return true
successPrompt: Write a success answer. The manager is happy with your choice of [PlayerKeyword] because it was an appropriate amount of non-lethal, corporate-approved enthusiasm
negativePrompt: Write a negative answer. The manager is unhappy with your choice of [PlayerKeyword] because it caused him a lot of pain and was very inappropriate and disgraceful
imageEditPrompt: Change the black ball being thrown in the air in this image with a [PlayerKeyword]
